title: Support  - Poly Product Support screen color in light mode
scenario: Product Support screen top box color does not match main body color in Light mode on Poly Lens Menu
steps: Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the device.
Ensure the app is in Light Mode (default theme).
Tap the Poly Lens Menu (hamburger menu or menu icon) on the Home screen.
Tap the 'Product Support' link to navigate to the Product Support screen.
Observe the color of the top box/header area on the Product Support screen.
Compare the top box color to the main body color of the same screen.
expected: The top box color on the Product Support screen should match the main body color of the screen, providing a consistent visual appearance in Light Mode.
